description_long: This vending machine features a rounded, retro-inspired design with a predominantly white exterior accented by irregular black patches, reminiscent of a cow pattern. The front panel is equipped with a pink product retrieval slot and a matching pink display panel above it, both framed by metallic elements. To the right of the retrieval slot, there is a vertical array of circular buttons and a rectangular payment interface, suggesting multiple product options and payment methods. The sides and back are smooth, with ventilation grilles and access panels visible, indicating internal machinery and maintenance access. The overall build appears robust, with a slightly raised base and a compact, monolithic form. Subtle wear and discoloration add to its urban, utilitarian character.
description: A cow-patterned, retro-style vending machine with pink accents, a front display, and multiple buttons and payment options.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink display panel, product retrieval slot, vertical button array, and payment interface, with cow-patterned exterior.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the smooth, rounded surface with black patches and a small ventilation grille near the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, curved back with two access panels and scattered black patches.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring another ventilation grille and more cow-patterned black patches on the white surface.
attribute_display_panel: A small, rectangular pink display panel is located above the product retrieval slot on the front, with a raised border and faint text.
attribute_payment_interface: A vertical payment interface is present to the right of the retrieval slot, featuring a card reader and possibly a bill acceptor, with metallic and copper-colored elements.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Four circular product selection buttons are arranged vertically to the right of the display and retrieval slot, each with a distinct color or label.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular pink product retrieval slot is centrally located on the front, below the display panel, with a recessed opening.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A pink sign with the word 'MILK' and smaller text is positioned above the display panel on the front, serving as branding and product indication.
